title: Digital garment printing machine augmented to apply additional materials
abstract: A textile printer with decoration support comprises a track for a printing pallet extending along a first axis, the printing pallet being controllably mobile along the track, a rail for a print head, the rail along a second axis at right angles to the first axis, a digital print head mounted on the rail and controllably mobile along the second axis to scan across the printing pallet and print an image onto a garment on the printing pallet using textile printing inks, and a material deposition head also mounted to scan across the printing pallet to deposit material onto the garment in alignment with the image.
claims: 1. A textile printer with additional deposition support comprising: a linear track for a printing pallet extending along a first axis, the printing pallet being controllably mobile to move linearly along said track; a rail for a digital print head, the rail extending along a second axis at right angles to said first axis; a digital print head mounted on said rail and controllably mobile to move linearly along said second axis to scan across said printing pallet and print an image onto a garment on said printing pallet using textile printing inks; a motion system for a material deposition head, the motion system configured to move along a third axis being parallel to said second axis and along a fourth axis being parallel or same to said first axis; and a material deposition head mounted on said motion system to move linearly on both third and fourth axes across said printing pallet to deposit material onto said garment in alignment with said image; wherein said rail is configured to move said digital print head linearly along a single axis thereby performing raster print and said motion system is configured to move said material deposition head in more than one axis at a time therefore performing vector deposition.
